subcodes.first_line: O wandering servant of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Some of thy letters were received and answers were penned. Strange indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره عبدالبهاء بعضی از مکاتیب شما رسید و جواب مرقوم گردید عجیب است
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @regarding the receptivity of the hearer in teaching the Cause
